zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons於大約0880年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，他的父親King Cadell ap Rhodri30歲，母親Princess Rheingar16歲。他和Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales至少有8個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於0950年享年71歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯瓦爾 本 格拉莫爾根利藍特維特 梅傑。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Dda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons was born about 0880, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, King Cadell ap Rhodri, was 30 and his mother, Princess Rheingar, was 16. He had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales. He died in 0950, at the age of 71, and was buried in Llantwit Major, Vale of Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons est né environ 0880, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, King Cadell ap Rhodri, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Princess Rheingar, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales. ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britonsが約0880年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父King Cadell ap Rhodriは30歳，母Princess Rheingarは16歳であった。彼はQueen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Walesとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は0950年に71歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズベル オフ グラモーガンラントウィト マジャーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons(이)가 대략 0880년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Cadell ap Rhodri(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Rheingar(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0950년 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 발 프 글램르건 랜트윗 마조르에 묻혔다.

ru.Llantwit Major, Vale of Glamorgan, Wales: ллантвит маджор, веил оф глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons родился около 0880 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени King Cadell ap Rhodri было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Rheingar, 16. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales. Он умер в 0950 г. в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ллантвит маджор, веил оф глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel Dda ap Cadell King of the Britons nació aproximadamente 0880, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, King Cadell ap Rhodri, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Princess Rheingar, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas con Queen Elen ferch Llywarch of Deheubarth And South Wales. Murió en 0950, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Llantwit Major, Vale of Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
